name: naval
description: Unofficial n-prefixed skills for applying ideas from The Almanack of Naval Ravikant.

interface.shortDescription: Searchable n-prefixed skills for Naval ideas.
interface.longDescription: Unofficial Naval Skills provides 76 n-prefixed skills that help agents apply ideas from The Almanack of Naval Ravikant. The skills cover wealth, judgment, happiness, health, values, reading, decisions, scorecards, daily reviews, weekly reviews, source fidelity, and quote safety. The pack includes shared references, a router, examples, install docs, and coverage checks. It does not include the full book text.
defaultPrompt: Use n-router to choose the right Naval skill.
